---
name: Quest Idea
about: Suggest a new quest type that should be achievable in Dwarf Fortress
title: "[Quest] "
labels: quest-idea
assignees: ''
---

## Quest Title
A short name for the quest.

## Description
What should the player do?

## Category
- [ ] Military
- [ ] Construction
- [ ] Religious
- [ ] Crafting
- [ ] Exploration
- [ ] Social
- [ ] Chaos

## Difficulty
- [ ] Easy
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Hard
- [ ] Legendary

## DF Mechanics
How is this achievable in vanilla Dwarf Fortress? What game mechanics does it use?

## Narrative Hook
How could this drive the story of a fortress? What makes it interesting narratively, not just as a task?
